description_long: This bungalow features a low, sprawling profile with a prominent hip roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the front facade includes a central entrance with a wooden door and a short driveway leading up to it. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged along the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and lush landscaping, including several tall palm trees and dense shrubbery, which add privacy and a tropical ambiance. The roof overhangs slightly, offering shade to the windows and entryway. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on horizontal lines and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light exterior walls, symmetrical windows, and lush landscaping with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, symmetrical windows, and prominent hip roof with palm trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, the boundary wall, and the arrangement of palm trees and shrubs along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by dense foliage, with the hip roof and some windows partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the roof structure, side windows, and extensive landscaping with palm trees and shrubs.
